zh.Loudoun,,Ayrshire,Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Loudoun於1169年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度時，她的父親James de Loudoun43歲，母親Jane39歲。她於1190年之前與Reginald de Crawford在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Loudoun于1169年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾盧度时，她的父亲James de Loudoun43岁，母亲Jane39岁。她于1190年之前与Reginald de Crawford在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Loudoun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Loudoun was born in 1169, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James de Loudoun, was 43 and her mother, Jane, was 39. She married Reginald de Crawford before 1190, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She was buried in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Loudoun est née en 1169, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James de Loudoun, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Jane, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald de Crawford avant 1190, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elleenterrée à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Loudoun 1169 in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James de Loudoun 43 und ihre Mutter Jane 39. Sie hat vor 1190 in Ayrshire, Scotland Reginald de Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie wurde in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Loudoun è nata il nel 1169 nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, James de Loudoun, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Jane, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Reginald de Crawford prima del 1190, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolta a Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Loudounが1169年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで生まれた時，父James de Loudounは43歳，母Janeは39歳であった。1190年以前にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでReginald de Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Loudoun(이)가 1169년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de Loudoun(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1190년 이전 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Reginald de Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Loudoun nasceu em 1169, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James de Loudoun, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Jane, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald de Crawford antes 1190, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela foi sepultada em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Loudoun родилась в 1169 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James de Loudoun было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Jane, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald de Crawford перед 1190 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она была похоронена в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Loudoun nació en 1169, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, James de Loudoun, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Jane, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Reginald de Crawford antes de 1190, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Fue sepultada en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
